media.title: Amid contract changes, injured ace Garrett Crochet hopes reverse engineer a playoff return to Red Sox - The Boston Globe
media.description: Out since late April, Crochet would need six weeks or so to prepare to start for the Red Sox after clearance to throw. The long injured-list stay will soon change his contract, too.

items.body_excerpt: Heat hold true to staying ready with premature post of LeBron welcoming. www.sun-sentinel.com/2026/07/22/h... Wishful? Perhaps. But at the moment that's all.

media.title: Heat hold true to staying ready with premature post of LeBron welcoming
media.description: It’s a Miami Heat mantra that has been in place since Pat Riley’s arrival as franchise steward in 1995: “Stay ready so you don’t have to get ready.” In this case too ready with LeBron James.
